images.caption: Figure 1:An overview of the VideoKR training corpus. All videos are newly collected and CC licensed, and span a wide range of professional domains. We develop a skill oriented QA synthesis pipeline in which every example is grounded in one of three core skills essential for advanced video reasoning, and examples in the CoT subset are further paired with a high quality reasoning trace.
Figure 2:(Left) Overview of data construction pipeline. (Right) Statistics of VideoKR-SFT-201K and VideoKR-RL-114K training corpus.
Figure 4:A VideoKR-SFT-201K example from the natural science domain. The reasoning process is presented in a concise and abbreviated form to improve readability.
